FlashMapData.title: FlashMapData
FlashMapData.description: Stores the user's mind map data including nodes and edges.

uid.description: The user ID of the owner.

nodes.description: JSON stringified array of nodes to bypass Firestore nested array/object limitations.

edges.description: JSON stringified array of edges to bypass Firestore nested array/object limitations.

/users/{userId}/mapData/current.description: The user's current mind map data.
